name: Jeff Flake
summary: Former Republican senator who delivered a major Senate floor speech warning against the undermining of democratic norms and later endorsed Kamala Harris in 2024.

keyStatements.quote: We must never regard as 'normal' the regular and casual undermining of our democratic norms and ideals.
We must never meekly accept the daily sundering of our country — the personal attacks, the threats against principles, freedoms and institutions, the flagrant disregard for truth or decency.
For that reason, I'm endorsing Kamala Harris.

timeline.significance: Delivered floor speech warning against undermining democratic norms

credibility.background: Former U.S. Senator and Representative, U.S. Ambassador to Turkey

oppositionReasons: Warned against the casual undermining of democratic norms
Condemned attacks on institutions and disregard for truth
Said country should come before party

sources.title: Jeff Flake endorses Kamala Harris for president
